name: Frontend CI/CD

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'frontend/**'

env:
  # 前端專屬環境變數
  MAGIC_CODE_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.MAGIC_CODE_API_KEY }}
  FIREBASE_APP_ID: ${{ secrets.FIREBASE_APP_ID }}

jobs:
  build-and-distribute:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: ./frontend   # 切換到前端目錄
    
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build
        run: npm install && npm run build

      - name: Magic Code 觸發
        run: |
          # 你的 magicCode 觸發邏輯
          curl -X POST https://api.magiccode.com/trigger \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $MAGIC_CODE_API_KEY"

      - name: Firebase App Distribution
        run: |
          npm install -g firebase-tools
          firebase appdistribution:distribute build/app.apk \
            --app $FIREBASE_APP_ID \
            --groups testers
